description_long: This is a small, decorative pedestrian bridge with a gently arched wooden deck and robust, dark gray stone or metal railings. The deck features a warm, orange-brown wood texture with visible grain and scattered metallic or stone inlays. Four prominent posts, two at each end, anchor the railings, which are adorned with simple geometric details. The bridge includes a thin, black fishing rod or pole attached to one side, suggesting a playful or thematic element. The underside of the bridge is smoothly curved, supporting the arch structure. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, suitable for parks, gardens, or urban walkways.
description: A small arched pedestrian bridge with a wooden deck, dark stone or metal railings, and decorative posts. Features a fishing rod attached to one side, blending functional and ornamental elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden deck, two prominent posts, and the fishing rod extending over the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arch of the bridge, the smooth curve of the underside, and the full length of the railings.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the deck, posts, and the fishing rod visible from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arch and railing details, with the fishing rod seen from a different angle.
attribute_railing_design: dark stone or metal railings with square posts and simple geometric detailing
